title: Crime Involving Economic Sabotage
content: Illegal recruitment is deemed committed by a syndicate if carried out by a group of three (3) or more persons conspiring or confederating with one another. It is deemed committed in large scale if committed against three (3) or more persons individually or as a group.

metadata.source_file: Omnibus IRR of RA 8042 as amended by RA 10022.pdf
